message:
feat(ci): add separate compile and run time tracking

Split timing into compile time and run time for EdgeBox tests:
- Compile time: JS bundling + bytecode compilation + AOT compilation
- Run time: actual WASM/AOT execution time

CI summary now shows both times, making it easier to compare
EdgeBox's actual runtime performance vs Node.js and Bun.

Example output:
| Runtime | Passed | Pass Rate | Compile | Run |
|---------|--------|-----------|---------|-----|
| EdgeBox | 21     | 100%      | 99.4s   | 3.6s|
| Bun     | 21     | 100%      | -       | 1.1s|
| Node.js | 21     | 100%      | -       | 1.4s|

files.patch:
@@ -80,6 +80,8 @@ jobs:
           edgebox_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           edgebox_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           edgebox_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          edgebox_compile_time=$(grep "^compile_time:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ' || echo "N/A")
+          edgebox_run_time=$(grep "^run_time:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ' || echo "N/A")
 
           # Run Bun tests (if bun available)
           if command -v bun &> /dev/null; then
@@ -91,6 +93,7 @@ jobs:
             bun_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
             bun_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
             bun_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+            bun_run_time=$(grep "^run_time:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ' || echo "N/A")
           else
             bun_time="N/A"
             bun_passed=0
@@ -107,22 +110,27 @@ jobs:
           node_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           node_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           node_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          node_run_time=$(grep "^run_time:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ' || echo "N/A")
 
           # Output all results
           echo "edgebox_passed=$edgebox_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "edgebox_failed=$edgebox_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "edgebox_skipped=$edgebox_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "edgebox_time=$edgebox_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_compile_time=$edgebox_compile_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_run_time=$edgebox_run_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
           echo "bun_passed=$bun_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "bun_failed=$bun_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "bun_skipped=$bun_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "bun_time=$bun_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_run_time=${bun_run_time:-N/A}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
           echo "node_passed=$node_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "node_failed=$node_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "node_skipped=$node_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           echo "node_time=$node_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_run_time=${node_run_time:-N/A}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
@@ -132,7 +140,8 @@ jobs:
           EB_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_passed }}"
           EB_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_failed }}"
           EB_TOTAL=$((EB_PASSED + EB_FAILED))
-          EB_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_time }}"
+          EB_COMPILE_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_compile_time }}"
+          EB_RUN_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_run_time }}"
 
           if [ $EB_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
             EB_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($EB_PASSED / $EB_TOTAL) * 100}")
@@ -144,7 +153,7 @@ jobs:
           BUN_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_passed }}"
           BUN_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_failed }}"
           BUN_TOTAL=$((BUN_PASSED + BUN_FAILED))
-          BUN_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_time }}"
+          BUN_RUN_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_run_time }}"
 
           if [ $BUN_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
             BUN_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($BUN_PASSED / $BUN_TOTAL) * 100}")
@@ -156,7 +165,7 @@ jobs:
           NODE_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_passed }}"
           NODE_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_failed }}"
           NODE_TOTAL=$((NODE_PASSED + NODE_FAILED))
-          NODE_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_time }}"
+          NODE_RUN_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_run_time }}"
 
           if [ $NODE_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
             NODE_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($NODE_PASSED / $NODE_TOTAL) * 100}")
@@ -169,11 +178,11 @@ jobs:
 
           echo "# Node.js $MODULE_NAME API - Runtime Comparison" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Runtime | Passed | Failed | Pass Rate | Time (s) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "|---------|--------|--------|-----------|----------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **EdgeBox** (AOT) | $EB_PASSED | $EB_FAILED | $EB_RATE | ${EB_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Bun** (compiled) | $BUN_PASSED | $BUN_FAILED | $BUN_RATE | ${BUN_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Node.js** (direct) | $NODE_PASSED | $NODE_FAILED | $NODE_RATE | ${NODE_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Runtime | Passed | Failed | Pass Rate | Compile | Run |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|---------|--------|--------|-----------|---------|-----|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **EdgeBox** (AOT) | $EB_PASSED | $EB_FAILED | $EB_RATE | $EB_COMPILE_TIME | $EB_RUN_TIME |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Bun** (compiled) | $BUN_PASSED | $BUN_FAILED | $BUN_RATE | - | $BUN_RUN_TIME |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Node.js** (direct) | $NODE_PASSED | $NODE_FAILED | $NODE_RATE | - | $NODE_RUN_TIME |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
           if [ $EB_FAILED -gt 0 ]; then

@@ -44,6 +44,19 @@ fi
 PASSED=0
 FAILED=0
 SKIPPED=0
+TOTAL_COMPILE_TIME=0
+TOTAL_RUN_TIME=0
+
+# Get time in milliseconds (cross-platform)
+get_time_ms() {
+    if [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then
+        # macOS: use python for millisecond precision
+        python3 -c 'import time; print(int(time.time() * 1000))'
+    else
+        # Linux: use date with nanoseconds
+        echo $(($(date +%s%N) / 1000000))
+    fi
+}
 
 echo "=== Node.js Core Tests for $RUNTIME ===" > "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Module: $MODULE" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
@@ -70,11 +83,18 @@ run_test() {
     local output
     local exit_code=0
 
+    local compile_time_ms=0
+    local run_time_ms=0
+
     if [ "$RUNTIME" = "edgebox" ]; then
         # Try to compile the test
         local compile_output
         local compile_exit=0
+        local compile_start=$(get_time_ms)
         compile_output=$(./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build "$test_app_dir" 2>&1) || compile_exit=$?
+        local compile_end=$(get_time_ms)
+        compile_time_ms=$((compile_end - compile_start))
+        TOTAL_COMPILE_TIME=$((TOTAL_COMPILE_TIME + compile_time_ms))
 
         if [ $compile_exit -ne 0 ]; then
             echo "✗ $test_name (compile failed)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
@@ -107,10 +127,18 @@ run_test() {
         fi
 
         # Run EdgeBox
+        local run_start=$(get_time_ms)
         output=$(run_with_timeout 10 ./zig-out/bin/edgebox "$wasm_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+        local run_end=$(get_time_ms)
+        run_time_ms=$((run_end - run_start))
+        TOTAL_RUN_TIME=$((TOTAL_RUN_TIME + run_time_ms))
     else
         # Run Node.js or Bun directly (no compilation needed)
+        local run_start=$(get_time_ms)
         output=$(run_with_timeout 10 $RUNTIME_CMD "$test_app_dir/index.js" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+        local run_end=$(get_time_ms)
+        run_time_ms=$((run_end - run_start))
+        TOTAL_RUN_TIME=$((TOTAL_RUN_TIME + run_time_ms))
     fi
 
     if echo "$output" | grep -q "^SKIP:"; then
@@ -1305,7 +1333,15 @@ else
     PASS_RATE="N/A"
 fi
 
+# Convert times to seconds with decimals
+COMPILE_TIME_SEC=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.3f\", $TOTAL_COMPILE_TIME / 1000}")
+RUN_TIME_SEC=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.3f\", $TOTAL_RUN_TIME / 1000}")
+TOTAL_TIME_SEC=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.3f\", ($TOTAL_COMPILE_TIME + $TOTAL_RUN_TIME) / 1000}")
+
 echo "pass_rate: $PASS_RATE" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+echo "compile_time: ${COMPILE_TIME_SEC}s" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+echo "run_time: ${RUN_TIME_SEC}s" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+echo "total_time: ${TOTAL_TIME_SEC}s" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Ended: $(date)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 
 # Print summary to console
@@ -1315,6 +1351,10 @@ echo "Passed:  $PASSED"
 echo "Failed:  $FAILED"
 echo "Skipped: $SKIPPED"
 echo "Pass Rate: $PASS_RATE"
+if [ "$RUNTIME" = "edgebox" ]; then
+    echo "Compile Time: ${COMPILE_TIME_SEC}s"
+fi
+echo "Run Time: ${RUN_TIME_SEC}s"
 
 # Exit with success (we want to track progress, not block CI)
 exit 0
